title: Support Date[Time] data types for partitioning
description:
Should work
```sql
CREATE TABLE wikistat_iceberg
(
`time` DateTime,
`project` String,
`subproject` String,
`path` String,
`hits` UInt64
)
ENGINE = IcebergS3('https://s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/wikistatbucket/', '***', '***')
PARTITION BY (identity(path), identity(time));
INSERT INTO wikistat_iceberg WITH
parseDateTimeBestEffort(extract(_file, '^pageviews-([\\d\\-]+)\\.gz$')) AS time,
splitByChar(' ', line) AS values,
splitByChar('.', values[1]) AS projects
SELECT
time,
projects[1] AS project,
projects[2] AS subproject,
decodeURLComponent(values[2]) AS path,
CAST(values[3], 'UInt64') AS hits
FROM s3Cluster('default', 'https://clickhouse-public-datasets.s3.amazonaws.com/wikistat/original/pageviews*.gz', 'LineAsString')
WHERE length(values) >= 3
LIMIT 10
Query id: 1ffc4763-7bad-4e00-b2a2-a2180d22dcae
Elapsed: 3.317 sec. Processed 261.64 thousand rows, 2.62 MB (78.87 thousand rows/s., 790.20 KB/s.)
Peak memory usage: 10.15 MiB.
Received exception from server (version 25.8.1):
Code: 36. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Unsupported type for iceberg Date. (BAD_ARGUMENTS)
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE wikistat_iceberg_v2 (time DATETIME, project VARCHAR(255), subproject VARCHAR(255), path VARCHAR(255), hits BIGINT, created_at DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE());
INSERT INTO wikistat_iceberg_v2 (time, project, subproject, path, hits, created_at) VALUES (NOW(), 'project1', 'subproject1', '/path/to/resource', CAST(100 AS BIGINT), CURRENT_DATE());
CREATE TABLE wikistat_temp (temp_time DATETIME, temp_hits BIGINT) ENGINE=MEMORY;
INSERT INTO wikistat_temp (temp_time, temp_hits) SELECT time, hits FROM wikistat_iceberg_v2 WHERE hits > 50;
SELECT temp_time, SUM(temp_hits) AS total_hits FROM wikistat_temp GROUP BY temp_time HAVING total_hits > 100;
key_bug_features: Unsupported type for iceberg Date during partitioning
